# Support MyNdiCam

## Support the Project

If you find MyNdiCam useful and would like to support its development, your support is greatly appreciated!

### Saweria

You can support me via Saweria:

<div align="center">

[![Saweria](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-via-Saweria-FF5E5B?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://saweria.co/widgets/qr?streamKey=37bac4cf1ea33f4b823b823a84429d82)

[Donate via Saweria](https://saweria.co/widgets/qr?streamKey=37bac4cf1ea33f4b823b823a84429d82)

</div>

### What your support helps with

- Continued development and bug fixes
- New features (audio streaming, 1080p support, etc.)
- Maintaining NDI SDK compatibility
- Testing on different devices

Thank you for your support!
